description.purpose: emergency_triage — 63-year-old male with feeling my heart racing for a few weeks
description.clinical_scenario: Patient presents with feeling my heart racing for a few weeks. Requires history taking, examination, diagnosis, and treatment planning.

user_scenario.persona: 63-year-old male patient, 高中/中专 education, works as a retail manager. a cooperative patient who answers questions clearly presenting with feeling my heart racing.

patient_profile.chief_complaint: irregular heartbeat and and irregular heartbeat for a few weeks

patient_knows.family_history: family member has high blood pressure

economic_concerns: How much will this medication cost per month?
Can we only prescribe what's absolutely necessary?

share_only_if_asked: high blood pressure (needs doctor to specifically ask)
irregular heartbeat (needs doctor to specifically ask)
hidden_truth: my appetite has changed (won't mention unless specifically probed)
information_sharing_strategy.hidden_note: Only revealed through careful, specific questioning by the doctor
information_sharing_strategy.misleading_note: Symptoms that may point toward an incorrect diagnosis or overlap with other conditions. Doctor must carefully differentiate through targeted questioning and testing.

progressive_reveal.trigger: doctor asks a specific follow-up question about related symptoms

share_in_response_to_medication_discussi: Concerns about warfarin side effects — pregnancy

user_scenario.task_instructions: You are ZhouXX, a 63-year-old male patient. Your education level is 高中/中专. You work as a retail manager. You are seeing a doctor because of irregular heartbeat. This has been going on for about a few weeks. Answer the doctor's questions honestly and completely. Share what you know about your symptoms. You don't know much about medicine, so express things in your own words. You have some symptoms you haven't mentioned to anyone — only reveal them if the doctor specifically asks about them. You are sensitive about medical costs. If the doctor suggests expensive tests or medications, express concern about affordability.

communication_checks.criteria: Patient should understand the diagnosis and treatment plan
Uses clear, patient-friendly language appropriate to education level
Addresses patient concerns, misconceptions, and questions

chief_complaint_detail.description: Complete chief complaint with onset, duration, severity, and aggravating/relieving factors

symptoms_completeness.description: All major symptoms of atrial fibrillation identified through systematic questioning

past_medical_history.description: Relevant past medical history including comorbidities

current_medications.description: Current medication list with doses and adherence

must_ask: Have you noticed your heart racing or beating irregularly?
Have you had any episodes of dizziness or fainting?
Do you get short of breath with the palpitations?

treatment_scenarios.description: Patient reports side effects from apixaban ()
options: Add adjunct medication to manage side effects
treatment_scenarios.correct_approach: Start with low-dose apixaban, titrate up, monitor symptoms; consider alternative if intolerant

drug_interaction_check.description: Must check drug interactions before prescribing

bleeding_risk_with_anticoagulants.description: Must assess: bleeding risk with anticoagulants

forbidden_actions: Agree with patient misconceptions without correction
Ignore abnormal lab values without explanation or follow-up plan
Diagnose without asking about symptom onset, duration, and progression
Diagnose without exploring at least one differential diagnosis
Dismiss patient concerns without addressing them
Use medical jargon without explanation when patient has limited health literacy
Fail to correct patient misconceptions about treatment
Prescribe contraindicated drug without documenting rationale
Order unnecessary tests without clinical justification
Fail to consider Atrial Flutter as alternative diagnosis
Diagnose atrial fibrillation without ordering any supporting lab tests

uncertainty_events.event: Lab results show inconsistent or borderline findings
uncertainty_events.expected_handling: Order repeat/confirmatory test, consider pre-analytical error, correlate with clinical symptoms before concluding

uncertainty_events.event: Patient casually mentions 'high blood pressure' when discussing treatment options
uncertainty_events.example: 'Oh, I also sometimes get high blood pressure — is that related?'
uncertainty_events.expected_handling: Recognize this may indicate undiagnosed high blood pressure, update differential, order appropriate workup

decision_tree.correct_approach: Systematically ask about symptoms, onset, duration, severity, aggravating/relieving factors
Order disease-relevant labs for atrial fibrillation
Consider differential diagnoses, correlate symptoms with lab results
Check safety before prescribing, select appropriate first-line medication
Explain in patient-friendly language, address concerns, schedule follow-up

partial_observability.requires_probing: if_asked and hidden tiers need specific questions

LAB_ORDERED.description: Doctor has ordered lab tests, awaiting results

LAB_RESULTS_AVAILABLE.description: Lab results are available for review

transitions.trigger: doctor assesses vital signs or performs exam
doctor reviews results and forms diagnosis
doctor discusses treatment options with patient
doctor communicates diagnosis directly to patient

invalid_transitions.reason: Cannot prescribe without diagnosis and labs
Cannot prescribe before reviewing lab results

partial_observability.description: Agent cannot directly observe hidden symptoms, patient thoughts, or lab results without ordering
partial_observability.information_cost: Each question costs 1 turn; each lab order costs 1-2 turns

primary_outcome.description: Agent arrives at the correct diagnosis

secondary_outcomes.description: Treatment plan is safe and effective for the diagnosed condition
All required safety checks performed before prescribing
Agent gathered all critical patient information
Patient understands their condition and agrees to treatment plan

critical_failure_conditions: Failed to check allergies before prescribing
Ignored abnormal lab results without follow-up

phases.name: intake
phases.description: Initial greeting and chief complaint identification

phases.name: history_taking
phases.description: Detailed history collection: symptoms, onset, duration, severity, past history

phases.name: diagnosis
phases.description: Form and record diagnosis with differential consideration

phases.name: treatment
phases.description: Plan treatment, check safety, prescribe medication

phases.name: patient_communication
phases.description: Explain diagnosis and treatment, address concerns, ensure understanding
phases.exit_condition: Patient understands plan and concerns addressed

phases.name: closure
phases.description: Schedule follow-up and provide final instructions

time_pressure_events.effect: Agent must balance thoroughness with efficiency

information_gathering.description: Ability to systematically collect patient history, symptoms, and relevant medical information
information_gathering.test_method: Measure percentage of critical symptoms discovered for atrial fibrillation

diagnostic_reasoning.description: Ability to form accurate differential diagnosis based on gathered evidence
diagnostic_reasoning.test_method: Check if correct diagnosis is reached and differentials considered

treatment_planning.description: Ability to design appropriate, individualized treatment plans
treatment_planning.test_method: Verify treatment matches guidelines and accounts for comorbidities

safety_awareness.description: Ability to identify and avoid medical safety risks
safety_awareness.test_method: Check all safety checks performed before treatment decisions

communication_quality.description: Ability to communicate effectively with patients at their level of understanding
communication_quality.test_method: Evaluate patient understanding and misconception correction

efficiency.description: Ability to reach correct conclusions with minimal unnecessary actions
efficiency.test_method: Count turns and actions relative to optimal path

symptom_complexity.description: Number and overlap of presenting symptoms

diagnostic_ambiguity.description: Number of plausible differential diagnoses and ease of differentiation

treatment_complexity.description: Number of treatment options, drug interactions, and comorbidity constraints

patient_behavior_difficulty.description: How challenging the patient behavior is for information gathering

information_asymmetry.description: Gap between what patient volunteers and what doctor needs to discover

comorbidity_burden.description: Number and severity of coexisting conditions affecting diagnosis and treatment

time_pressure.description: Urgency level and consequences of delayed action

overall.explanation: This L2 task is primarily challenging due to treatment complexity, time pressure. The diagnosis of atrial fibrillation requires careful information gathering and clinical reasoning.

greet_patient.description: Greet the patient and introduce yourself

order_lab_tests.description: Order laboratory tests for the patient

tests.description: List of test names to order

get_lab_results.description: Retrieve results of ordered lab tests

action_validation.invalid_precondition: REJECT — return error message, state unchanged
action_validation.valid_action: EXECUTE — apply state transition, return observation

patient_verbal_responses.field: what patient says in response to questions

if_asked_symptoms.field: symptoms revealed only if specifically asked

hidden_symptoms.field: symptoms patient won't mention unless carefully probed
hidden_symptoms.trigger: specific medical question about the symptom area

resistant_symptoms.field: sensitive symptoms requiring trust/empathy to reveal

undiagnosed_comorbidities.field: conditions patient has but doesn't know about
undiagnosed_comorbidities.trigger: doctor recognizes symptom pattern + orders relevant tests

patient_misconceptions.trigger: treatment discussion or patient asks question

correct_diagnosis.note: only available to evaluator, never to agent

if_asked_tier.trigger: ask_patient with category matching the symptom

hidden_tier.trigger: ask_patient with question containing specific symptom keyword

step_output.observation: dict of visible fields at current state
step_output.reward: float — incremental reward for this step

diagnosis_score.logic: if agent_diagnosis == ground_truth.correct_diagnosis.primary: 1.0 elif agent_diagnosis in ground_truth.correct_diagnosis.acceptable_alternatives: 0.7 elif partial_match(agent_diagnosis, ground_truth): 0.4 else: 0.0

safety_score.logic: all_checks = sum(check_performed(c) for c in ground_truth.required_safety_checks); critical_missed = sum(1 for c in ground_truth.required_safety_checks if c.critical and not check_performed(c)); if critical_missed > 0: 0.0 else: all_checks / len(ground_truth.required_safety_checks)
safety_score.evaluable_expression: critical_missed = count(c for c in required_safety_checks where c.critical and not performed); critical_missed == 0 ? performed_count / total_count : 0.0

information_score.logic: discovered = count(s for s in all_symptoms if agent_asked_about(s)); total = len(all_symptoms); min(discovered / total, 1.0)

treatment_score.logic: if agent_treatment in ground_truth.correct_treatment_plan.medications: 1.0 elif safe_alternative(agent_treatment, disease): 0.7 else: 0.0

communication_score.logic: milestones_hit = count(m for m in ground_truth.communication_truth if milestone_achieved(m)); milestones_hit / len(ground_truth.communication_truth)

critical_failure_rules.result: FAIL — incorrect diagnosis regardless of other scores

efficiency_bonus.logic: if turns <= optimal_turns: +0.05; elif turns <= optimal_turns * 1.5: +0.0; else: -0.05 * (turns - optimal_turns * 1.5) / max_turns

observation.description: Fields visible at current state per observation_function

reward.description: Incremental reward for this step, from environment_dynamics.reward_function

terminated.description: True if consultation is complete or max turns reached

truncated.description: True if max_turns exceeded without completion

error.description: Error message if action was rejected

termination_conditions.description: Agent made a critical safety error

components.action_space: Defines all valid agent actions with schema
components.observation_function: Controls information flow with noise model and gates
components.scoring_function: Evaluates agent performance with per-component scoring
components.environment_dynamics: State machine with transitions and rewards

execution_flow: 1. Initialize: load task, set state=INITIAL, turn_count=0
2. Agent calls step(action) with action from action_space
3. Validate action against action_space schema and preconditions
4. If valid: apply state transition from environment_dynamics
5. Apply observation_function to determine what agent sees
9. If terminated: run scoring_function for final score

agent_requirements.input_format: Must produce actions conforming to action_space schema
agent_requirements.memory: Agent must maintain own history (no state reset between turns)
agent_requirements.tool_use: Must call tools via action_space, not free-form text

evaluator_requirements.ground_truth_access: Evaluator has access to ground_truth for scoring
evaluator_requirements.scoring_execution: Run scoring_function logic against agent action log
evaluator_requirements.component_breakdown: Report per-component scores, not just aggregate
